name: Sichuan Huati Lighting Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Sichuan Huati Lighting Technology Co.,Ltd. provides a range of architectural lighting design services, and street and landscape lighting products and accessories in China. The company offers designer and smart lighting products, as well as fixtures and poles for outdoor environments and interior spaces. Sichuan Huati Lighting Technology Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Chengdu, China.
